name: effective_cache_size
description: Sets the planner's assumption about the total size of the data caches.
tuning_notes: Planner's OS cache estimate. Doesn't allocate memory, only affects plans.

name: max_parallel_workers_per_gather
description: Sets the maximum number of parallel processes per executor node.
tuning_notes: Parallelism for analytical queries. Limited by CPU cores.

name: random_page_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of a nonsequentially fetched disk page.
tuning_notes: Critical for index vs seqscan decisions. SSD: 1.0-1.5, HDD: 3.0-4.0

name: shared_buffers
description: Sets the number of shared memory buffers used by the server.
tuning_notes: Most impactful knob. Log scale because doubling matters more than addition.

name: work_mem
description: Sets the maximum memory to be used for query workspaces.
tuning_notes: Per-operation memory. Total can be work_mem * connections * operations_per_query

name: checkpoint_completion_target
description: Time spent flushing dirty buffers during checkpoint, as fraction of checkpoint interval.
tuning_notes: Spread checkpoint I/O over this fraction of checkpoint_timeout.

name: checkpoint_timeout
description: Sets the maximum time between automatic WAL checkpoints.
tuning_notes: Max time between automatic checkpoints. Affects recovery time.

name: default_statistics_target
description: Sets the default statistics target.
tuning_notes: Statistics sample size for ANALYZE. Higher = better plans, slower ANALYZE.

name: effective_io_concurrency
description: Number of simultaneous requests that can be handled efficiently by the disk subsystem.
tuning_notes: Expected concurrent I/O. SSD: 100-200, HDD: 1-2

name: maintenance_work_mem
description: Sets the maximum memory to be used for maintenance operations.
tuning_notes: For VACUUM, CREATE INDEX. Can be larger than work_mem.

name: wal_buffers
description: Sets the number of disk-page buffers in shared memory for WAL.
tuning_notes: WAL buffer size. Default -1 means auto (1/32 of shared_buffers).

name: autovacuum
description: Starts the autovacuum subprocess.
tuning_notes: Enable autovacuum. Usually keep on.

name: cpu_index_tuple_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of processing each index entry during an index scan.
tuning_notes: Cost of processing each index entry.

name: cpu_operator_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of processing each operator or function call.
tuning_notes: Cost of executing operators/functions.

name: cpu_tuple_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of processing each tuple (row).
tuning_notes: Cost of processing each row.

name: hash_mem_multiplier
description: Multiple of "work_mem" to use for hash tables.
tuning_notes: Hash operation memory multiplier; bounded to avoid aggressive memory oversubscription.

name: io_workers
description: Number of IO worker processes, for io_method=worker.
tuning_notes: I/O worker count (PG17+); bounded to practical CPU-core-aligned range.

name: maintenance_io_concurrency
description: A variant of "effective_io_concurrency" that is used for maintenance work.
tuning_notes: Maintenance I/O concurrency for VACUUM/CREATE INDEX, similar semantics to effective_io_concurrency.

name: max_connections
description: Sets the maximum number of concurrent connections.
tuning_notes: Max concurrent connections. Requires restart. High values increase memory.

name: max_parallel_maintenance_workers
description: Sets the maximum number of parallel processes per maintenance operation.
tuning_notes: Max parallel workers for maintenance (CREATE INDEX, VACUUM).

name: max_parallel_workers
description: Sets the maximum number of parallel workers that can be active at one time.
tuning_notes: Max parallel workers system-wide. Must be <= max_worker_processes.

name: max_wal_size
description: Sets the WAL size that triggers a checkpoint.
tuning_notes: Max WAL size before forced checkpoint.

name: max_worker_processes
description: Maximum number of concurrent worker processes.
tuning_notes: Max background workers. Requires restart. Must be >= max_parallel_workers.

name: min_wal_size
description: Sets the minimum size to shrink the WAL to.
tuning_notes: Minimum WAL size to keep.

name: seq_page_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of a sequentially fetched disk page.
tuning_notes: Cost of sequential page fetch. Usually kept at 1.0 as baseline.

name: autovacuum_max_workers
description: Sets the maximum number of simultaneously running autovacuum worker processes.
tuning_notes: Max autovacuum worker processes.

name: autovacuum_naptime
description: Time to sleep between autovacuum runs.
tuning_notes: Time between autovacuum runs.

name: autovacuum_worker_slots
description: Sets the number of backend slots to allocate for autovacuum workers.
tuning_notes: Autovacuum worker slot capacity; aligned with practical worker process limits.

name: bgwriter_delay
description: Background writer sleep time between rounds.
tuning_notes: ms between bgwriter rounds.

name: bgwriter_lru_maxpages
description: Background writer maximum number of LRU pages to flush per round.
tuning_notes: pages per bgwriter round.

name: enable_bitmapscan
description: Enables the planner's use of bitmap-scan plans.
tuning_notes: Enable bitmap scans.

name: enable_hashjoin
description: Enables the planner's use of hash join plans.
tuning_notes: Enable hash joins.

name: enable_indexscan
description: Enables the planner's use of index-scan plans.
tuning_notes: Enable index scans. Usually leave on.

name: enable_mergejoin
description: Enables the planner's use of merge join plans.
tuning_notes: Enable merge joins.

name: enable_nestloop
description: Enables the planner's use of nested-loop join plans.
tuning_notes: Enable nested loop joins.

name: enable_seqscan
description: Enables the planner's use of sequential-scan plans.
tuning_notes: Enable sequential scans. Usually leave on.

name: min_parallel_index_scan_size
description: Sets the minimum amount of index data for a parallel scan.
tuning_notes: pages required to trigger parallel index scan.

name: min_parallel_table_scan_size
description: Sets the minimum amount of table data for a parallel scan.
tuning_notes: pages required to trigger parallel table scan.

name: parallel_setup_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of starting up worker processes for parallel query.
tuning_notes: Cost of starting parallel workers.

name: parallel_tuple_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of passing each tuple (row) from worker to leader backend.
tuning_notes: Cost of transferring tuples between workers.

name: temp_buffers
description: Sets the maximum number of temporary buffers used by each session.
tuning_notes: Temp buffer size per session.

name: vacuum_cost_limit
description: Vacuum cost amount available before napping.
tuning_notes: aggregate cost cap for vacuum.

name: wal_writer_delay
description: Time between WAL flushes performed in the WAL writer.
tuning_notes: ms between WAL flushes.
